hero.title: Master Test Automation
hero.tagline: Real-world challenges designed by a Senior QA Engineer.
hero.description: I built this platform to share the practical patterns I rely on daily. No textbooks, just the real scenarios that taught me how to test.

careerPath.title: Your
careerPath.subtitle: A structured path from selector basics to advanced automation architectures.

basic.title: Selectors
basic.description: Master CSS and XPath selectors - the foundation of web testing

beginner.title: JavaScript
beginner.description: Learn JavaScript fundamentals for test automation

intermediate.title: Playwright
intermediate.description: Build real automated tests with Playwright

featuredChallenges.title: Solve a
featuredChallenges.subtitle: Start coding immediately. No setup required.

features.title: Everything You Need to
features.subtitle: A personal curriculum designed to take you from beginner to expert

interactiveTutorials.title: Interactive Tutorials
interactiveTutorials.description: Learn testing concepts step-by-step. I've broken down the tricky parts so you don't have to struggle.

playwrightChallenges.title: Browser Simulation
playwrightChallenges.description: Practice with sandboxed scenarios. Your code runs entirely in your browser - fast, secure, and no installation.

selectorChallenges.title: Selector Challenges
selectorChallenges.description: Master CSS and XPath selectors with visual feedback. See elements highlight as you type.

gamification.title: Gamification
gamification.description: Earn XP, level up, unlock achievements, and compete on the leaderboard. Learning made fun!

instantFeedback.title: Zero Friction
instantFeedback.description: Start coding immediately. No account required. Just verify your skills and go.

trackProgress.title: Track Progress
trackProgress.description: See your progress across tutorials and challenges. Never lose track of where you left off.

step1.title: Choose a Challenge
step1.description: Pick from Playwright, CSS selectors, or JavaScript challenges.

step2.title: Write Your Code
step2.description: Use our embedded code editor. Everything runs locally in your browser for instant feedback.

step3.title: Get Instant Feedback
step3.description: Run your code and see results immediately. Earn XP when you pass!

mission.title: Built by
mission.story1: I am a QA Engineer who loves building tools. I started my career with zero QA experience and survived thanks to patient mentors.
mission.story2: TestingWithEkki is my way of passing that forward.
mission.story3: Not everyone has a mentor to guide them, so I'm building the resource I wish I had: practical, hands-on lessons that actually make sense.
mission.author: Ekki

cta.title: Ready to automate your first real scenario?
cta.subtitle: Start solving practical challenges that mirror real-world applications. Free forever for individuals.

hallOfFame.subtitle: See the latest achievements unlocked by the community.
